sections.description: Editorial headline + stub disclaimer (no real OAuth).
Optional decorative provider tiles; non-functional except primary Continue.
Primary control sets stub auth cookie via server action and redirects to /dashboard.
Curator-style intro band; must not obscure todo workspace below.
TodoWorkspace organism: list/create/toggle/edit/delete with existing server actions.
Copy when items array length is 0.
Banner + retry when fetch not ok.

routes.title: Task Creation (Dark)
routes.theme_scope: Route subtree only: apply dark tokens under /tasks/new via nested layout; do not set global dark on html/body for other routes.

sections.description: Dark surface header + back link to dashboard.
Composer using Neubrutal controls; submits createTodoAction.

auth.notes: Middleware redirects protected routes to /login when cookie absent. Logout clears cookie.

requirements: Semantic landmarks: main, header, nav, article per route.
Visible focus styles on all interactive controls (2px offset ring using accent).
Dialogs retain aria-modal and labelled headings.
